name: Hioki E.E. Corporation
summary: Hioki E.E. Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, sells, and services electrical measuring instruments worldwide. The company offers automatic test equipment for testing of electronic circuit boards, and boards with embedded active and passive devices. It also provides data recording equipment for development of transport-related equipment, as well as monitoring and detecting equipment malfunctions. In addition, the company offers electronic measuring equipment for testing electronic components and evaluation of the quality of energy-saving equipment and power supplies; and field measuring instruments for performing maintenance and inspection of electrical work and equipment. Further, it provides data acquisition oscilloscopes, multichannel and compact data loggers, residence meters and battery testers, LCR and capacitance meters, impedance analyzers, super megohmmeters, electrometers, picoammeters, electrical safety testers, digital multi meters, signal generators, high precision power meters, power quality analyzers and power loggers, RGB laser optical meters, LED optical meters, and LAN cable testers, as well as hipot, insulation, and leakage testers. Additionally, the company offers current probes and sensors, magnetic field meters, infrared thermometers, temperature meters, insulation testers, clamp multi meters, ground resistance testers, phase rotation meters, and voltage detectors; solar panel and photovoltaic system maintenance testers; bare board/package/populated board testing products; meter relays, CTs, and shunts; specialized solutions; and other electrical measuring instruments. Its products are used in the automotive, environmental and alternative energy, and electronic components; and other applications, such as construction and facilities, household appliances, office, communications, chemical, food product, and pharmaceutical and medical research. The company was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Ueda, Japan.
